sent_simp: 他给情人送了一束玫瑰花。
sent_trad: 他給情人送了一束玫瑰花。
pinyin: Tā gěi qíngrén sòng le yī shù méiguihuā.
english: He gave his sweetheart a bouquet of roses.

sent_simp: 她特地买了一件法制香水当礼物。
sent_trad: 她特地買了一件法制香水當禮物。
pinyin: Tā tèdì mǎi le yī jiàn fǎzhì xiāngshuǐ dāng lǐwù.
english: She specifically bought a French-made perfume as a gift.

sent_simp: 他周末做兼职来赚点外快。
sent_trad: 他週末做兼職來賺點外快。
pinyin: Tā zhōumò zuò jiānzhí lái zhuàn diǎn wàikuài.
english: He does part-time work on weekends to earn some extra income.
He is never late for work.
